violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets on several doors for the walk-cooler were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2026

The hand-washing sinks in the back storage area and next to the coffee brewing area were lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at both sinks during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The walk-in cooler door gasket was observed to be missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The floor in the back storage area by the 3-bay sink and the mop sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the back storage area behind the hand sink, 3-bay sink and the wall next to mop sink do not have coving. The coving in the bathroom was also observed in poor repair. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2024
